title: Arrabidaea podopogon
taxonomy: Arrabidaea podopogon is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Arrabidaea, which contains several species of vines and shrubs native to Central and South America. The Bignoniaceae family, also known as the trumpet vine family, comprises over 800 species of flowering plants. This plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Bignoniaceae family.
